title: Router fee transfer hard-dependency can halt all buys and sells
reason: Requires privileged owner misconfiguration/intentional behavior; owner already has direct control over trading parameters, so this is not a distinct external exploit.

title: Unvalidated directionMask can produce malformed pool encoding in flashloan callback
reason: Malformed masks mainly cause caller-side reverts/self-grief; no convincing shared-state corruption or protocol-level loss path was supported.

title: LamboToken implementation contract can be initialized and minted by anyone
reason: Affects only the standalone implementation instance, not factory-created clones; no protocol fund or permission impact beyond potential off-chain confusion.

title: Rebalance profit calculation includes user-provided ETH wrapped as WETH
reason: The code subtracts `initialBalance` before wrapping (`newBalance = address(this).balance - initialBalance`), so pre-existing ETH is not counted as profit in the stated way.

title: Router missing deadline parameter enabling transaction reordering
reason: Users already have slippage protection via `minReturn`; missing deadline alone is not a concrete, distinct protocol vulnerability here.

title: Rebalance can be DoS'd by reverting onMorphoFlashLoan callback
reason: Reverting callback only reverts the attacker/caller transaction itself; no persistent permissionless DoS mechanism was shown.

title: VirtualToken repayLoan allows arbitrary debt repayment for any user
reason: `repayLoan` is `onlyValidFactory` and burns the target account’s tokens alongside debt reduction; the claimed free external debt manipulation is unsupported.

title: Rebalance infinite approval to OKXTokenApprove
reason: Approvals are set to `amountIn` per call, not to unlimited allowance.

title: Rebalance _executeBuy doesn't validate swap success or returned amount
reason: If execution yields insufficient result, end-of-function profitability checks revert the transaction and roll back state; the claimed permanent loss path was not substantiated.

title: Router getBuyQuote and getSellQuote can return stale/inaccurate quotes
reason: Reserve-based view quotes are inherently point-in-time estimates; this is expected AMM behavior and not a standalone security issue.

title: LamboFactory createLaunchPad does not validate pool creation success
reason: Uniswap V2 `createPair` reverts on failure/existing pair; a meaningful zero-address success path is not realistic under the configured factory.

title: VirtualToken takeLoan lacks loan repayment tracking per user
reason: This is already captured by existing finding F-002 (global per-block loan quota can be consumed for DoS).
